## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Source, license, attribution, and provenance are documented.
- [ ] Any required notice updates are completed.
- [ ] Blocked content is removed or replaced with original project wording.
- [ ] Review decision is recorded.

## Testing/build notes

- [ ] Run `npm run build` if repository files or app behavior changed, or document why it is skipped.
- [ ] Run content validation scripts if configured and relevant.
- [ ] Run lint/format checks if configured and relevant.

## Content/licensing checklist

- [ ] Unapproved official rulebook prose is blocked for public MVP.
- [ ] Official art, icons, copied layout, screenshots, and trade dress are blocked unless explicitly approved.
- [ ] Original app helper text is preferred for UI and documentation.
- [ ] Bundled content includes provenance metadata when applicable.
- [ ] User-authored content is treated separately from bundled app content.
